data.body: Plan-review PASSED round 3 (signed). Impl commit 23581b171. Needed 2 remediations, both on making the 'no-drift' verification concrete (the gate rejected vague 'offline replay over corpus' + 'pinned baseline snapshot' with no location). Final: criteria_routing.json applies the exact table (6 lowered @0.60, 4 promoted blocking @0.70/0.75, T4 unchanged); test_threshold_recalibration.py pins the 11 + a deterministic threshold_for simulation (0.65 blocks lowered, stranded on promoted) + a full-table INLINE pin (no snapshot file). validate_packaged_routing parity holds. Live-corpus block-rate delta -> #3 calibration.
